creator: jeffrey@goldmark.org
text:
On Dec 15, 2009, at 12:57 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/p5-Lchown,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/141555 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/141555

I approve of this patch.  Thanks for submitting it.

Cheers,

-j
